description_long: This is a modern assault rifle with a distinctive black and olive green color scheme, featuring a metal receiver and a polymer handguard. The rifle is equipped with a folding skeletonized stock, allowing for compact storage and maneuverability in urban environments. Its barrel is long and slender, ending in a flash hider, and the rifle is fitted with standard iron sights for aiming. The magazine is a curved, detachable box type, typical for rifles of this class, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The handguard has ventilation slots, and the overall build suggests a robust, utilitarian design. The finish is matte, reducing glare and enhancing concealment.
description: A modern assault rifle with a folding skeletonized stock, olive green handguard, and a curved detachable magazine. It features a matte black and green finish with iron sights and a flash hider.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, flash hider, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the folding skeletonized stock, olive green handguard, curved magazine, and pistol grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock structure and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with more detail on the handguard and magazine.
